lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant mechanical repairs. The exterior has extensive body damage, including rust and large dents. The interior is heavily worn and requires refurbishment.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior is straight and retains a strong finish, though it does show minor cosmetic imperfections such as small stone chips and light surface scratches typical of a used car. Mechanically, it is sound and runs smoothly, with all major systems functioning as intended. The interior is clean and comfortable, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. It is a reliable, roadworthy vehicle ready for its next owner.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute gem! This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been flawlessly maintained to look and drive like it just left the showroom. It is a perfect choice for anyone seeking a top-tier car that has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It requires major mechanical repairs and is not currently in reliable running condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. Mechanically, it is sound and performs reliably, with a complete service history available for review. The exterior presents well, though it does show some minor signs of age, including a few small door dings and light surface scratches that are typical for its mileage. The interior is clean and comfortable; the seats are free of rips or stains, although there is some minor wear on the steering wheel and driver's side bolster. All power features, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are in full working order. This is a solid, dependable car that offers a great balance of quality and value.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained in impeccable, showroom-quality condition. This vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, representing an elite tier of automotive preservation and mechanical integrity. A rare acquisition opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s basically brand new? I'm selling my car and it is in absolutely gorgeous, mint condition! I've babied this thing since the day I got it, so it's spotless inside and out. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person—you really have to see it to believe it! I'm so excited for whoever gets to take this beauty home next.

Offering an investment-grade 2003 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine, museum-quality condition. This example features the iconic S54B32 3.2L inline-six engine, boasting high-pressure Double-VANOS variable valve timing and six individual throttle bodies for instantaneous throttle response. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a mechanical limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal power delivery. The chassis has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement and retains its factory-spec suspension geometry with fresh bushings and Sachs dampers. Every mechanical component, from the rod bearings to the cooling system, has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserving the analog tactile feedback and high-revving performance characteristics of this legendary platform. Unmodified and structurally flawless.
Mint condition. Flawless original paint. Pristine interior. Mechanically perfect. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like gloss with a professional ceramic coating and absolutely zero stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, while the dash and trim remain pristine. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history exclusively through authorized technicians. Every component functions exactly as intended, from the smooth-shifting transmission to the ice-cold climate control. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting the low mileage and high level of care this vehicle has received. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just left the dealership floor. Includes all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a clean title in hand.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This unit features a flawless exterior finish and an interior devoid of any discernible wear, representing a rare opportunity for the most discerning collector. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, it stands as a definitive benchmark for the model. Acquisitions of this caliber are infrequent; we invite serious inquiries only.

Presented for the discerning collector, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained to an exacting standard, its aesthetic and mechanical integrity remain indistinguishable from the day it departed the showroom. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, offering an ownership experience that is as rare as it is rewarding. This is an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless quality.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible, mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it's been garage-kept and pampered since day one. You won't find a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. It's a total dream to drive and I'm honestly a little sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it! Come check it out!

This collector-grade E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated S54 performance. Featuring a meticulously maintained 3.2L straight-six with individual throttle bodies, the engine delivers instantaneous throttle response and a linear
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. Full service history included.

This 2012 Porsche 911 Carrera is a true time capsule, presented in showroom condition. The Basalt Black Metallic paint retains a deep, glass-like luster, free from any stone chips or blemishes. Inside, the Luxor Beige leather interior is pristine, with no signs of bolster wear or aging, and every electronic component functions perfectly. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, this vehicle comes with a complete service history and drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new car. From the spotless engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels, every detail has been preserved for the most demanding collector.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring flawless exterior finishes and a pristine interior environment. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical perfection, it offers an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in mint, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every surface and mechanical component reflects meticulous preservation, ensuring an uncompromising driving experience. We invite prospective buyers to inspect this pristine example of engineering precision.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty—it’s honestly in pristine, showroom condition. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it garage-kept and spotless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and looks practically brand new. I'm sad to let it go, but I know it'll make the next owner super happy! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This collector-grade E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a factory 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a precise ZF 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain is mechanically flawless with documented VANOS servicing and a reinforced rear subframe. The limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction. This pristine example boasts an unblemished chassis and showroom-quality interior, offering a pure analog driving experience.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. No scratches. Smoke-free interior. Full maintenance history.

Presenting a truly showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and remains in absolute pristine condition, featuring a flawless original paint finish with zero swirl marks, dents, or scratches. The interior is equally immaculate, boasting premium leather upholstery that remains supple and a smoke-free cabin that retains its original freshness. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been serviced exclusively at authorized dealerships with a full, documented history. Every electronic feature and safety system functions perfectly. Driven sparingly and never in inclement weather, this vehicle offers a like-new driving experience with tight handling and a smooth, powerful engine. This is a rare opportunity to own a top-tier example of this model that looks and performs as if it just left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously kept interior, reflects a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and vigor of a new unit, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. This is a premier acquisition for those who demand absolute perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains virtually untouched. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unparalleled ownership experience. Meticulously inspected and certified, it stands as a testament to superior care and engineering integrity.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute gem! It is in such incredible, pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such good care of it, and it really shows in every little detail. If you're looking for a ride that's basically flawless and ready to hit the road today, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to achieve a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock. This chassis is mechanically sorted with documented rod bearing service and proactive rear subframe reinforcement. Every suspension component maintains factory tolerances, ensuring the telepathic handling characteristics these longitudinal rear-wheel-drive platforms are known for. Zero deferred maintenance, original paint, and a flawless interior make this a benchmark example for the discerning collector.
Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Original paint. Showroom condition. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies the most discerning collector's standards. This car has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in an exterior finish that retains its deep, original luster without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte, free from any bolster wear or creasing, and every piece of trim is factory-perfect. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented by a complete service history from certified specialists. The engine bay is detailed to a professional standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. Equipped with all original accessories, keys, and manuals, this is a rare opportunity to own a flawless specimen that drives as tightly as the day it left the assembly line.

We are proud to present this exemplary motorcar, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection in both aesthetics and mechanical integrity.
